features.name: Flyby
features.description: The owl doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

actions.name: Talons
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Slashing damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Scout - Silent aerial observer with exceptional senses
tactical_info.positioning: Uses flyby to avoid retaliation, superior darkvision for night ops
tactical_info.damage_output: 1 slashing per hit, minimal direct threat
tactical_info.key_abilities: Extended darkvision (120 ft), flyby movement, high stealth
tactical_info.synergies: Perfect familiar, scout, and night reconnaissance specialist
